title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 356.261 - Application of law
text:
356.261.  Application of law. — On and after August 13, 1986, the provisions of sections 356.011 to 356.261 shall apply in full to all corporations previously subject to any law which was a predecessor to sections 356.011 to 356.261.
(L. 1986 H.B. 1230)
